title: Fig. 1 207 Mathematics
subject: Mathematics
objective: To make a kite by paper folding and cutting
materials:
Thick paper, cardboard, pen/pencil, ruler, scissors,
adhesive.
procedure:
1.   Take a rectangular thick white paper.
2.   Fold it once as shown in Fig. 1.

237 Mathematics
In Fig. 5, all the four sides are _____and all the four angles are_____.
So, ABCD is a regular polygon of sides _____.
In Fig. 6, all the five sides are _____ and all the five angles are _____.
So, ABCDE is a polygon of sides_____.
discussion:
This activity is useful in explaining the meaning of a regular polygon and
how to draw a regular polygon.
